message:
refactor(observability): remove unused max_event_history field from TaskInspectorConfig

The max_event_history field and its builder method with_max_event_history()
were never consumed by any task inspection logic — the runtime diagnostics
path uses checkpoint-based idle-time heuristics and obligation ownership
tracking, neither of which reference a per-task event history cap.

Removing the dead field simplifies the config surface and eliminates a
misleading API that suggested per-task event buffering was configurable
when no such mechanism exists. The module docstring is also updated to
more accurately describe the actual capabilities: checkpoint-based
idle-time heuristics, wake-pending state, obligation ownership, and
deterministic wire snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
